title: erigeron acris subsp. droebachensis
intro: Erigeron acris subsp. droebachensis, also known as Alpine Fleabane or Droebach Fleabane, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and aiding in the relief of respiratory problems. Erigeron acris subsp. droebachensis is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
